user.title: Battery Thresholds
user.description: Configure when tier 2 devices should be turned off and restored based on battery SOC. You can adjust these later in the integration options. Sensors (SOC, grid) can be added after setup via Configure.

notifications.title: Notification Services
notifications.description: Select which notification services should receive Battery Guard alerts. Persistent notifications are always enabled. You can change this later.

error.recovery_must_exceed_threshold: Recovery threshold must be higher than shutdown threshold

init.title: Sensors
init.description: Configure SOC and grid sensors. Add these once your PV system is integrated via Modbus. Leave empty if not available yet.

voltage.title: Voltage Monitoring Sensors
voltage.description: Select the voltage sensors for each phase. A power outage is detected when all three phases drop below 50V.

thresholds.title: Thresholds & Notifications
thresholds.description: Configure battery thresholds and notification services. Changes will reload the integration.

error.recovery_must_exceed_threshold: Recovery threshold must be higher than shutdown threshold
